```{r echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message=FALSE}
source("init.R")
```

# Interlude I - Gummy bears {#sec-temp}

*Last modified on `r format(fs::file_info("interlude-I-gummibaers.qmd")$modification_time, '%d. %B %Y at %H:%M:%S')`*

> *"Gummi Bears! Bouncing here and there and everywhere; High adventure that's beyond compare; They are the Gummi Bears." --- Gummi Bears Theme, Adventures of the Gummi Bears*

## General background

## Theoretical background

## R packages used

## Data

```{r}
gummi_tbl <- read_excel("data/gummibears.xlsx")
```


## Alternatives 

Further tutorials and R packages on XXX

## Glossary

term

: what does it mean.

## The meaning of "Models of Reality" in this chapter.

- itemize with max. 5-6 words

## Summary

## References {.unnumbered}
